last_message.content: I couldn’t complete this because Spotify authentication failed (401 Invalid credentials), so I don’t have an authenticated session or access to your play data across songs, albums, and playlists. Please provide valid Spotify login/auth credentials (or reconnect Spotify), and I can then return the top 3 indie song titles as a comma-separated list.
